name: TRUMP ALERT (via FlaDems.com)
subject: re: Mar-a-Lago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Did you see the team's note, friend? Check it out and [**stand up for Florida taxpayers:**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b26e/1a5213b3/769f22b5/718ba69e/527044725/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWSVQwMUZVRWhQVGtVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/demand-trump-reimburses-florida?source=em041217&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&phone=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+stand+up+for+Florida+taxpayers&utm_campaign=em041217&refcode=em041217")

_Begin original message from FlaDems.com:_

Friend,

Listen, there really isn't a simpler way to say this: Donald Trump has spent a LOT of time in Florida as president.

**Since he 's been here so much, we know one thing: Floridians must pay for Trump's MASSIVE security detail one way or another.** That means passing the buck to taxpayers and forcing local business closures each time Trump visits his luxurious resort in Palm Beach.

[**That is why Florida Democrats are demanding that the federal government reimburse Floridians for the security costs incurred by Trump 's trips. Click here and add your name if you agree.**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b26e/1a5213b3/769f22b5/718ba699/527044725/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWSVQwMUZVRWhQVGtVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/demand-trump-reimburses-florida?source=em041217&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&phone=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+That+is+why+Florida+Democrats+are+demand&utm_campaign=em041217&refcode=em041217")

Floridians shouldn't be required to pay the costs for Trump to be in Mar-a-Lago. Trump and the federal government should reimburse us for these massive costs, plain and simple.

[**Agree? Add your name here.**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b26e/1a5213b3/769f22b5/718ba698/527044725/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWSVQwMUZVRWhQVGtVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/demand-trump-reimburses-florida?source=em041217&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&phone=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Agree+Add+your+name+here&utm_campaign=em041217&refcode=em041217")

Thanks,

FlaDems.com

---

| Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
---

We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. Click [**here**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b26e/1a5213b3/769f22b5/718ba69b/527044725/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI3NjlmMjJiNSIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6Ijc3YjRiMjZlIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/769f22b5/77b4b26e?utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em041217&source=em041217&refcode=em041217") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.

Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats!.

name: Tom Perez
subject: We'll fly you out to join me and Bernie in Las Vegas
body:
You and a friend could win a free trip to Las Vegas.
---
**Pitch in $3 or more to be automatically entered for a chance to join Tom and Bernie on the Come Together and Fight Back Tour in Las Vegas!

** **[ENTER](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c977/4067b0a/2eb3923b0/7e721662/4194363503/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Tom-and-Bernie-in-Vegas-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ENTER&utm_campaign=em_20170413_tp_nd&source=em_20170413_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170413_tp_nd")**
Next week, Bernie Sanders and I are hitting the road to meet with Democrats around the country and talk about how we're getting the Democratic Party back on track.

I want you to have a chance to join us.

**[Chip in $3 or whatever you can to be automatically entered for a chance to win a free trip to Las Vegas for our final Come Together and Fight Back Tour rally.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c977/4067b0a/2eb3923b0/7e721663/4194363503/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/Tom-and-Bernie-in-Vegas-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+3+or+whatever+you+can+to+be+auto&utm_campaign=em_20170413_tp_nd&source=em_20170413_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170413_tp_nd")**

You've already done so much this year to stand up to the Trump administration and fight for the values we share.

You've marched at airports to stop an immoral Muslim ban, called your members of Congress and showed up at town halls to protect every American's right to health care, and stepped up to help Democrats win elections in states from Delaware to Alaska.

You're an important part of everything our party does and who we are as Democrats. This is your chance to get the VIP treatment you deserve.

If you win, we'll fly you and a guest of your choice out to Las Vegas, put you up at a great hotel, and give you VIP passes to Bernie's and my last big rally.

All you have to do is get your name in the hat. Chip in $3 or whatever you can to continue supporting our party, and you'll be automatically entered for a chance to win.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c977/4067b0a/2eb3923b0/7e721660/4194363503/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/come-together-and-fight-back-contest?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170413_tp_nd&source=em_20170413_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170413_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c977/4067b0a/2eb3923b0/7e721661/4194363503/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/come-together-and-fight-back-contest?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170413_tp_nd&source=em_20170413_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170413_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c977/4067b0a/2eb3923b0/7e72166e/4194363503/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/come-together-and-fight-back-contest?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170413_tp_nd&source=em_20170413_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170413_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c977/4067b0a/2eb3923b0/7e72166f/4194363503/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/come-together-and-fight-back-contest?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170413_tp_nd&source=em_20170413_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170413_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c977/4067b0a/2eb3923b0/7e72166c/4194363503/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/come-together-and-fight-back-contest?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170413_tp_nd&source=em_20170413_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170413_tp_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c977/4067b0a/2eb3923b0/7e72166d/4194363503/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/Tom-and-Bernie-in-Vegas-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170413_tp_nd&source=em_20170413_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170413_tp_nd")
** Thanks -- and good luck.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

|

No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win. Contributing will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by 4/16/17. [Enter by contributing here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c977/4067b0a/2eb3923b0/7e72166a/4194363503/VEsP/ "http://my.democrats.org/tour-contest?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+Enter+by+contributing+here&utm_campaign=em_20170413_tp_nd&source=em_20170413_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170413_tp_nd"), or click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c977/4067b0a/2eb3923b0/7e72166b/4194363503/VEsHBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/tour-contest-signup?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170413_tp_nd&source=em_20170413_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170413_tp_nd") to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Las Vegas, NV; one (1) night's hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; the opportunity for winner and winner's guest to attend a DNC event on 4/22/17 (approximate retail value of all prizes $3,000). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c977/4067b0a/2eb3923b0/7e721668/4194363503/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/tour-contest-rules?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+Official+Rules&utm_campaign=em_20170413_tp_nd&source=em_20170413_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170413_tp_nd") and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003.

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c977/4067b0a/2eb3923b0/7e721669/4194363503/VEsHBw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170413_tp_nd&source=em_20170413_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170413_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c977/4067b0a/2eb3923b0/7e721676/4194363503/VEsHBg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170413_tp_nd&source=em_20170413_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170413_tp_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c977/4067b0a/2eb3923b0/7e721677/4194363503/VEsHAQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170413_tp_nd&source=em_20170413_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170413_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c977/4067b0a/2eb3923b0/7e721674/4194363503/VEsHAA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170413_tp_nd&source=em_20170413_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170413_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

Every year we give the Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award to a pro-choice Democratic woman serving in state or local office who has shown true leadership in her community and has a promising career in public service in front of her.

Previous awardees include Georgia House Minority Leader Stacey Abrams, Boston City Councilwoman Ayanna Pressley, and Colorado House Speaker Crisanta Duran. Each of these women has been a trailblazer and undaunted advocate for women and families -- just like Gabrielle Giffords.

I'm always impressed by the women who are nominated for this award, which makes picking just one of them REALLY hard. That's why I'm asking you to weigh in.

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: The Koch brothers
body:
These ideas should not be controversial.
#
Team --
Yesterday, we held a press conference to talk about what we believe should be done differently in Florida's education system. In that conference, I suggested that we should go into neighborhoods with failing schools, and try to work on the root of the problem -- to invest more in those students, and in those communities, instead of passing profits onto private education corporations.
Research tells us that providing early childhood education, along with ensuring that these students have access to healthcare and are not food insecure, will help our kids learn. It's hard to pay attention in class when you are sick, or when your stomach is grumbling from hunger. These ideas should not be controversial.
But to the Koch brothers, these ideas are very controversial. After our press conference, their organization, Americans for Prosperity, issued a press release that accused me of "encouraging failure factories."
[**If you disagree with the Koch brothers, help our campaign fight back against these attacks on our education policy by making a contribution of $20.18 or whatever is meaningful to you >>**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb338d/9e00690/49f071d8/24034759/13668136/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-april2017?refcode=em20170413-koch")
Let me be clear -- a school with students that are struggling is not a "failure factory," and it is horrifying to me that anyone would suggest that any young student is a "failure." When I'm Governor, we're going to work together with our schools and provide their students the resources they need, instead of branding them with a harsh label and giving up on them.
I believe in every student in Florida, and I know it is our duty to ensure that they have the resources they need to fulfill their potential. Together, we're going to make that happen.
Bring it home,
Andrew
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb338d/9e00690/49f071d8/24034759/13668136/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-april2017?refcode=em20170413-koch")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

name: Russ Feingold, LegitPAC
subject: End the Electoral College
body:
We can eradicate the Electoral College on a state-by-state basis without a constitutional amendment. | [](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46ce/1c469400/2ddb93f/35494de/2845726596/VEsH/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/20170412-electoral-college_LP?source=20170413_r4w_NPV_petition_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20170413_r4w_NPV_petition_RS") Friend, The Electoral College silences the voices of all kinds of people in presidential elections -- but it hits minority voters especially hard. That is not a coincidence. The Electoral College is a relic of slavery, designed to balance the power between slave-owning and non-slave owning states, at a time when African-Americans were considered 3/5s of a person and women didn't vote at all. And yet despite the many overdue advancements to our country over the years, we have retained the relic that is the Electoral College, which to this day disempowers minorities. That's one major reason why we say the Electoral College is undermining the legitimacy of our democracy. It's also a major reason why LegitAction is now officially advocating to replace the Electoral College as it functions today with a national popular vote instead. [**_If you want the Electoral College to stop suppressing the voices of millions of voters, especially minorities, sign LegitAction 's petition in support of the national popular vote today._**](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46ce/1c469400/2ddb93f/35494df/2845726596/VEsE/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/20170412-electoral-college_LP?source=20170413_r4w_NPV_petition_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=2+-+If+you+want+the+Electoral+College+to+sto&utm_campaign=20170413_r4w_NPV_petition_RS") Many of us were outraged by what happened in last year's election. Two of our last three presidents have now taken the White House in defiance of the American voters. That is not legitimate democracy! It is on us to take our anger and frustration and turn it into change. One of the absolutely necessary changes is to eradicate the Electoral College, and we can do it on a state-by-state basis **without a constitutional amendment.** LegitAction is already helping build this movement in Connecticut, and we're planning to expand to every state we can. Now we're organizing supporters behind this effort nationwide. [**_Sign our petition today to show you support a national popular vote that will help restore legitimacy to our presidential elections._**](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46ce/1c469400/2ddb93f/35494dc/2845726596/VEsF/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/20170412-electoral-college_LP?source=20170413_r4w_NPV_petition_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=3+-+Sign+our+petition+today+to+show+you+supp&utm_campaign=20170413_r4w_NPV_petition_RS") Right now, our country is in a legitimacy crisis. We are being governed by someone we, the voters, did not choose. The voices of certain minority groups are being especially targeted. Ending the Electoral College is one key step we can take to restore our democratic legitimacy. Thank you for standing up for legitimacy today, Russ Feingold
| [SIGN ON](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46ce/1c469400/2ddb93f/35494dd/2845726596/VEsC/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/20170412-electoral-college_LP?source=20170413_r4w_NPV_petition_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=4+-+SIGN+ON&utm_campaign=20170413_r4w_NPV_petition_RS")

**_From the Mouth of Joe Donnelly Himself_**
Joe Donnelly talks one way in Washington, D.C., and another way in Indiana. You've probably heard that line a lot over the years. And it's true. He's had a way of standing shoulder-to-shoulder with Barack Obama, Hillary Clinton, Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer and the whole liberal team while pretending he's never met them while on the Indiana campaign trail. Now that he's under pressure from folks on the left upset with his vote to confirm Justice Neil Gorsuch to the Supreme Court, Donnelly finally admitted the truth about his liberal voting record in an interview with the [_South Bend Tribune_](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=14fbdf4907&e=1acd9bb3d6) when he said, "You (liberals) love nine out of 10 of my decisions. So on the last one, you're going to burn the house down?” Yes, Senator, that's exactly what they're going to do. They've gotten so used to being able to count on you to support their priorities like Obamacare and the Iran deal that they aren't sure how to react. Glad we've finally got that on the record.

\- Kyle
---
|

---
|

| In a moving ceremony, Governor Holcomb this week presented the state's highest honor, the Sachem Award, to Eva Kor. He also[ signed HEA 1278](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b7baa6fab5&e=1acd9bb3d6) which commissions the Indiana State Department of Health to work with our state's Family and Social Services Administration to develop a plan to combat cervical cancer in the State of Indiana. The [bill was authored](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b51069ec6a&e=1acd9bb3d6) by Representative Sharon Negele, our 4th District Vice Chair! Governor Holcomb also announced the theme of this year's Indiana State Fair.
